mapper.select: SELECT * FROM invitation WHERE short_code = #{shortCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM invitation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE invitation SET pv = pv + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE invitation SET uv = uv + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE invitation SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE invitation SET attend_count = attend_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE invitation SET bless_count = bless_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
